title: Dimension Value
description: Value schema for dimension type tokens. Represents an amount of distance in a single dimension in the UI, such as a position, width, height, radius, or thickness.

value.description: An integer or floating-point value representing the numeric value.

unit.description: Unit of distance. Supported values: 'px' (idealized pixel, equivalent to dp on Android and pt on iOS), 'rem' (multiple of system's default font size), 'em' (added for DESIGN.md compatibility).

oneOf.$comment: DESIGN.md extension: added 'em'. DESIGN.md spec allows px, em, and rem (spec-config.yaml:28). Original DTCG schema only allows px and rem.
